name: Tango Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Tango Therapeutics is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing precision oncology therapies. Its product candidates include PRMT5 inhibitors, CoREST inhibitors, and HBS1L degraders. The company protects its technology through patents and trade secrets.

exposures.sentence: We also rely on trade secrets relating to our proprietary target discovery technology platform and on know-how, continuing technological innovation and in-licensing opportunities to develop, strengthen and maintain our proprietary position in the field of precision oncology that may be important for the development of our business and product candidates.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance of IND for vopimetostat to initiate Phase 1/2 clinical trials
catalysts.sentence: In 2023, we received FDA clearances of our IND applications for vopimetostat and TNG260 to initiate Phase 1/2 clinical trials for each product candidate.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance of IND for TNG260 to initiate Phase 1/2 clinical trials
catalysts.sentence: In 2023, we received FDA clearances of our IND applications for vopimetostat and TNG260 to initiate Phase 1/2 clinical trials for each product candidate.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance of IND for TNG456 to initiate Phase 1/2 clinical trials
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we received clearance of our IND application for TNG456 to initiate Phase 1/2 clinical trials for this product candidate.

catalysts.event: FDA granted Fast Track designation to vopimetostat for previously treated, locally advanced, and unresectable or metastatic MTAP-deleted solid tumors
catalysts.sentence: In 2023, the FDA granted Fast Track designation to vopimetostat for previously treated, locally advanced, and unresectable or metastatic MTAP-deleted solid tumors, and to TNG260 in combination with an anti-PD-1 antibody for the treatment of patients with previously treated, advanced (metastatic or locally advanced and not amenable to curative intent therapy) NSCLC with STK-11 mutations.

catalysts.event: FDA granted Fast Track designation to TNG260 in combination with an anti-PD-1 antibody for STK-11 mutant NSCLC
catalysts.sentence: In 2023, the FDA granted Fast Track designation to vopimetostat for previously treated, locally advanced, and unresectable or metastatic MTAP-deleted solid tumors, and to TNG260 in combination with an anti-PD-1 antibody for the treatment of patients with previously treated, advanced (metastatic or locally advanced and not amenable to curative intent therapy) NSCLC with STK-11 mutations.

catalysts.event: FDA granted Fast Track designation to TNG456 as single agent for MTAP-loss solid tumors and in combination with abemaciclib for MTAP-loss NSCLC
catalysts.sentence: In February 2025, the FDA granted Fast Track designation to TNG456 as a single agent, for the treatment of patients with locally advanced or metastatic solid tumors with MTAP loss, and in combination with abemaciclib, for the treatment of patients with locally advanced or metastatic NSCLC with MTAP loss.
